free_text: Study of Airy-structure in elastic scattering of
16O+12C at the energy of 16O nuclei 8-18 MeV/nucleon.
Target: C-12, beam: O-16,
incident energy: 132 MeV.
Incident energy of 132 MeV.
Position sensitive system was used as a detector. It
consisted of extended ionizing chamber as  dE-detector
and 10 silicon diodes with the thickness of 300  mu-m
and a detector of 1*1 cm as E-detector.
Method of 12C recoil nuclei detection in forward
hemisphere was additionally used to measure cross
sections at backward angles.
Digitized data were replaced by original
author's data in sub 002. Reaction definition in sub
002 was changed. Description of the target was added.
Reference code was added.
Self-supporting 12C target with the thickness of
0.24 mg/cm2 was used.
Statistical errors
Data were presented by author (A.S.Dem'yanova)
Error from the graphic bars
Fig.3
